name: ds_rest_sap_b1_api
description: REST dataset for SAP Business One Service Layer API (OData v4 over HTTPS). Extracts Journal Entry Lines (JournalEntries endpoint) for a given posting date range. Session authentication is handled at the linked service level via B1SESSION cookie renewal. Linked service: ls_rest_sap_b1. Remediates FINDING A-02.

date_from.description: Start posting date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). Used in OData $filter expression.

date_to.description: End posting date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

entity_code.description: FIP entity code — used for Bronze path and batch logging. SAP B1 company DB is configured in the linked service Key Vault secret (sap-b1-company-db).

skip_rows.description: OData $skip value for server-side pagination. ADF ForEach loop increments this by page_size until an empty collection is returned.

page_size.description: OData $top value — number of journal entry lines per request. SAP B1 Service Layer default max is 1000.

relativeUrl.value: @{concat('/JournalEntries?$select=JdtNum,TransId,ReferenceDate,DueDate,Memo,TransactionCode,JournalEntryLines/AccountCode,JournalEntryLines/AccountName,JournalEntryLines/Debit,JournalEntryLines/Credit,JournalEntryLines/DebitSys,JournalEntryLines/CreditSys,JournalEntryLines/FCCurrency,JournalEntryLines/FCDebit,JournalEntryLines/FCCredit,JournalEntryLines/CostingCode,JournalEntryLines/ProjectCode,JournalEntryLines/LineMemo&$expand=JournalEntryLines&$filter=ReferenceDate ge ', dataset().date_from, ' and ReferenceDate le ', dataset().date_to, '&$skip=', string(dataset().skip_rows), '&$top=', string(dataset().page_size), '&$orderby=ReferenceDate asc')}

schema.name: JdtNum
schema.description: SAP B1 Journal Document Number (unique per company DB)

schema.name: TransId
schema.description: SAP B1 Transaction ID (maps to source_system_id in FIP)

schema.name: LineNum
schema.description: Line number within the journal entry (from JournalEntryLines)

schema.name: AccountCode
schema.description: G/L account code (maps to local_account_code in FIP)

schema.name: DebitSys
schema.description: Debit in system currency (HUF — same as Debit for HU entities)

schema.name: FCCurrency
schema.description: Foreign currency code (ISO 4217; null for HUF-only postings)

schema.name: FCDebit
schema.description: Debit in foreign currency (null if FCCurrency is null)

schema.name: CostingCode
schema.description: SAP cost centre code (maps to cost_centre_code in FIP; nullable)

schema.name: ProjectCode
schema.description: SAP project code (maps to project_code in FIP; nullable)
